variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16526 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16526 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16526 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 180.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 148.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 299.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 297.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P617645 Air Filter, Safety Radialseal | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16526
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P617645 Air Filter, Safety Radialseal | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16526
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Safety Filters? Safety filters have two functions: to act as a backup to the primary filter and to protect the engine during primary filter servicing. • Serve as a backup filter in case of primary filter damage or improper installation. • Prevent contaminants from entering the clean side of the air intake system during primary filter servicing. • Designed to plug rapidly if contamination finds its way past the primary filter, alerting operators about an issue. • Recommend that safety filters are replaced with every third primary filter change unless there has been a failure of the primary filter.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF26336 Air | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16526
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF26336 Air | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16526
variants.description: Fleetguard® OptiAir™ AF26336 secondary air element addresses key design requirements of all equipment manufacturers while outperforming conventional radial seal designs. Resulting in extended service intervals, reduced downtime, and lower maintenance costs.
